# AppLibrary.App.Installation

**Structure**

A structure that provides progress information for a specific app installation.

## Declaration

```swift
struct Installation
```

## Overview

The [doc://com.apple.MarketplaceKit/documentation/MarketplaceKit/AppLibrary/App/installation-swift.property] property of the[doc://com.apple.MarketplaceKit/documentation/MarketplaceKit/AppLibrary/App] class is of this type.

## Inspecting installation progress

- **progress**: The progress representing the download & installation of this app. It may be used to pause, resume, or cancel installation depending on the state of this object.

## Inspecting app installation and update status

- **installation**: The progress of the app’s installation.
- **isInstalled**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the app’s installation is complete.
- **isInstalling**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the app’s installation is in progress.
- **isUpdating**: A Boolean value that indicates whether an app’s update is in progress.
- **installationError**: An error that occurs during the installation of an app that resides on a marketplace.

## Conforms To

- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
